title: Senior Financial Analyst - Scripbox Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Scripbox Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Scripbox Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Scripbox Holdings Services:
Scripbox Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox Holdings Services!
